notes: v1.13.5 — LANDING TIER-B (behavior/layout refinements, operator-approved despite the earlier freeze). #boot globe-landing only: (B1) .pl-stage height 460px -> clamp(380px, 55vh, 540px) so the globe fills tall iPads and fits short iPhones, max-bounded so it can't balloon; (B2) under prefers-reduced-motion the globe internal animation now freezes too (render clock paused -> no point twinkle/flare, static hub dots + arc-packets) while drag-to-spin, online-charge, and the warp still work (they use rotY / warpT, not clock); (B3) the per-frame canvas brightness/saturate filter now writes only when the integer online% changes, not every frame. In normal (no-reduce) mode the spin-to-online -> lock -> warp flow, the ambient space layer + UFO, and all inputs are unchanged. Verified: node --check 3/3 inline scripts, CSS braces balanced, CRLF preserved (0 lone LF), four stamps lockstep. NOT device-verified -- these are layout/motion changes that need on-device eyes (WebGL not renderable here): confirm tall/short-screen composition, the reduced-motion calm, and that the online glow-ramp still reads smoothly.
